assertions.title: Polymarket-style login buttons
assertions.reason: When disconnected, the top navbar displayed both 'Log In' and 'Sign Up' buttons.

steps.expected: Navbar shows Log In and Sign Up while disconnected
steps.observed: Navbar showed both Log In and Sign Up buttons

evidence.network: Frontend polled GET http://localhost:3100/market and GET http://localhost:3100/depth

assertions.title: Connected wallet display
assertions.reason: No connectable wallet/credentials were available in the isolated browser; Aptos wallet options were install links and Google OAuth required external credentials.

steps.expected: Connect wallet and return with connected state (truncated address + green pulse + badge)
steps.observed: Wallet modal opened with social buttons and Aptos install links only
New tab opened to accounts.google.com sign-in requiring credentials not provided in isolation context

evidence.network: OAuth redirect to https://accounts.google.com/... observed; no authenticated wallet session established

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing provisioned wallet extension or social-login credentials in this validation environment.

assertions.title: USD1 balance in dropdown
assertions.reason: Wallet connection prerequisite could not be satisfied, so connected wallet dropdown (and USD1 balance line) was not reachable.

steps.action: Attempt to connect wallet from Log In modal
steps.expected: Connected dropdown opens and shows USD1 balance
steps.observed: Could not complete wallet authentication due missing wallet/credentials

evidence.network: Authentication flow could not be completed to reach dropdown state

assertions.issues: Blocked by unavailable authenticated wallet connection in the assigned isolation context.

assertions.title: Frontend loads testnet data
assertions.reason: UI loaded CASH/USD1 surface, but backend market/depth endpoints repeatedly returned 429, preventing confirmation that displayed values came from live testnet orderbook data.

steps.action: Load frontend and inspect market surface
steps.expected: CASH/USD1 chart/depth/market info from testnet data
steps.observed: Frontend rendered CASH/USD1 UI and quote text, but data provenance could not be validated

steps.action: Run browser-side fetch checks for /market and /depth with retries
steps.observed: Three retry attempts over ~20s all returned marketStatus=429 and depthStatus=429

evidence.network: GET http://localhost:3100/market and GET http://localhost:3100/depth observed repeatedly; browser eval retries returned 429 on both endpoints

assertions.issues: Blocked by persistent API rate limiting (HTTP 429) during validation window.

assertions.title: Wallet connect to testnet orderbook
assertions.reason: Could not complete wallet authentication (required for connected dropdown with USD1 balance), and /market-/depth endpoints were rate-limited during validation.

steps.expected: Wallet connects and navbar shows connected address
steps.observed: Authentication could not be completed in isolated session

steps.expected: Connected-wallet quote flow with testnet orderbook quote
steps.observed: Quote detail rendered (1 CASH = 0.049432 USD1) but session remained disconnected and backend market/depth checks returned 429

evidence.network: Repeated GET http://localhost:3100/market and GET http://localhost:3100/depth observed; direct browser fetch checks returned 429 for both

assertions.issues: Blocked by two prerequisites: no authenticated wallet session and persistent API rate limiting.

frictions.description: Wallet social login opened external OAuth page requiring credentials not provided in isolation context.
frictions.resolution: No safe in-scope resolution available; marked wallet-dependent assertions blocked.

frictions.description: Frontend aggressively polled /market and /depth, creating very large network logs and repeated 429 responses.
frictions.resolution: Retried endpoint checks 3 times with backoff; 429 persisted.

blockers.description: No provisioned connectable wallet (extension) or social-login credentials available in assigned browser isolation for completing authenticated wallet state.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened Log In modal, checked Aptos tab (install-only links), attempted Google OAuth redirect; flow required external credentials.

blockers.description: API endpoints required to verify live testnet market/depth data returned HTTP 429 repeatedly.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried browser-side /market and /depth fetches three times over ~20s; all attempts remained 429.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 1 passed, 0 failed, 4 blocked (wallet-auth prerequisites and API 429 rate limiting).
